description:
WASM-generated .d.ts files provide only basic interface declarations. Web
components resort to 'as any' casts (9+ occurrences) to call WASM methods.

Affected locations:
- web/src/PcmSynthEditor.tsx lines 302, 342, 367, 410, 455, 464, 473
- web/src/useMixer.ts lines 72, 154

Fix: Ensure wasm-bindgen generates complete TypeScript definitions for all
exported Rust structs and methods. Create a shared types.ts that mirrors the
Rust serde output. Eliminate all 'as any' casts.
title: Generate TypeScript types from WASM bindings
